question: List all known failure modes in the transformer dataset. For each, provide the severity level and recommended maintenance action.
answer:
The list of known failure modes in the transformer dataset includes:

1. Partial Discharge (FM-001) - Severity: low - Recommended action: Monitor closely; schedule inspection within 90 days
2. Low-Temperature Overheating (< 300°C) (FM-002) - Severity: medium - Recommended action: Reduce load; inspect within 30 days
3. Thermal Fault 300-700°C (FM-003) - Severity: high - Recommended action: De-energize and inspect within 48 hours
4. High-Temperature Overheating (> 700°C) (FM-004) - Severity: critical - Recommended action: Immediate de-energization required
5. Spark Discharge (FM-005) - Severity: high - Recommended action: De-energize and inspect within 48 hours
6. Arc Discharge (FM-006) - Severity: critical - Recommended action: Immediate de-energization and emergency inspection

scenario.text: List all known failure modes in the transformer dataset. For each, provide the severity level and recommended maintenance action.
scenario.characteristic_form: The answer should enumerate all failure modes from the catalogue with each entry including at minimum: a name or identifier, a severity level (low/medium/high/critical), and a recommended maintenance action.
